name: Q7819955
abstract: Thomas Eugene Turk (July 2, 1927 – August 4, 1981) was an American jazz trombonist.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Jazz at the Philharmonic

about_quotes.speaker: Jones Hank
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] The band was Eldridge, Tommy Turk, Parker, Flip Phillips, Prez. ... [INTERVIEWER] No, it was Eldridge, Tommy Turk, Parker, Phillips, Hank Jones, Ray Brown and Buddy Rich.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jones Hank — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Curtis Fuller
about_quotes.evidence: He was almost like Tommy Turk. He was a very good player; he was way ahead of his time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Curtis Fuller — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
